rationale: The cited study is referenced mainly as part of broad literature overviews of prior event studies on new product announcements/preannouncements (including summary tables). In the citing paper, it serves as a background example of this stream rather than as a specific framework the authors develop, test, or operationalize. The citing paper does not directly build its hypotheses on the cited paper's core mechanisms or replicate its design in a way that gives this specific citation a distinct functional role.
